series_metadata.series_description: These files contain studies completed on behalf of the ORDC and include information such as budget projections, funding mechanisms, capital improvement plans, cost-sharing feasibility analyses, implementation schedules and funding sources.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper for 5 years then scan final study/deliverable, then destroy paper. Review by State Archives. ; Electronic: Retain electronic version of final study/deliverable permanently, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
